title: Evangelion calendar 2019
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion calendar 2019             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Fri Aug 31, 2018 5:16 am Takeshi Honda art. I can't find it on amazon. :( http://www.eva-info.jp/4674

[]: Re: Evangelion calendar 2019             Quote Post by Joseki » Fri Aug 31, 2018 10:37 am Bland, the 2018 one was cooler.

[]: Re: Evangelion calendar 2019             Quote Post by pwhodges » Fri Aug 31, 2018 11:03 am Are those even new pictures?

[]: Re: Evangelion calendar 2019             Quote Post by Blockio » Sat Sep 01, 2018 10:29 am ...I think they are new. Not a lot of difference to the previous set of Q character artwork, but the pose appears to be a bit different. But generally underwhelming in my opinion, apart from possibly maybe the cover image

[]: Re: Evangelion calendar 2019             Quote Post by Joseki » Thu Oct 25, 2018 12:46 pm I just noticed it is branded with a "Road to 2020" logo, which makes think there's gonna be a proper big Eva celebration in 2020.

[]: Re: Evangelion calendar 2019             Quote Post by pwhodges » Thu Oct 25, 2018 1:06 pm I believe there might even be a film coming out; just something I heard...

[]: Re: Evangelion calendar 2019             Quote Post by DarkBluePhoenix » Sat Oct 27, 2018 7:09 pm ^ Don't go spreading rumors now

[]: Re: Evangelion calendar 2019             Quote Post by kuribo-04 » Thu Nov 08, 2018 7:08 pm I bought it (has yet to arrive). I love Takeshi Honda, so I'm happy with it.
